nodes.name: NEWSLETTER TYPE
nodes.notes: Check the newsletter type

nodes.name: INFLUENCER: GET INFLUENCER DATA
nodes.notes: Get all the data if newsletter type is Influencer.

nodes.name: GET BODY FIELD
nodes.notes: Get only the body field from the webhook

nodes.name: INFLUENCER: APPSCRIPT ACQUIRE
nodes.notes:
• Send a POST request to the Apps Script code we created for the Google Sheet document.
• The Apps Script implements a lock function to handle concurrency situations.
• We pass query parameters such as action=acquire and scope=influencer, with the redirect option enabled.
• The Apps Script is redeployed every time we make changes to the code.

nodes.name: INFLUENCER: CHECK SUCCESS IF TRUE
nodes.notes:
• The success field is returned by the Apps Script.
• When two users submit at the same time, one user will receive success: true, while the other will receive success: false. The one with success: false will keep looping until it becomes true.

nodes.name: MERGE PLACEHOLDER
nodes.notes: THIS NODE IS PLACEHOLDER: This way the Code Node only fires once after both appends are done

parameters.content:
## Newsletter Booking

**Purpose:**
- The purpose of this workflow is to avoid overbooking newsletters such as Influencer and Press, allowing only a total of 13 bookings per day across all placement types.

**Newsletter Type:**
- Influencer - MONDAY & FRIDAY ONLY
- Press - MONDAY - FRIDAY ONLY
- Both - MONDAY & FRIDAY ONLY

**Influencer Placement:**
- Featured Demo - 1 (not often)
- Featured - 1
- Promoted - 6
- Standard - 6 (less prio, 5 only if there's featured demo)

**Press Placement:**
- Featured Demo - 1 (not often)
- Featured - 1
- Promoted - 4
- Standard - 8 (less prio, 7 only if there's featured demo)

TOTAL MAX OF 13 BOOKINGS PER DAY

## Documentation
- This automation will run when a webhook received a data from react form.

- For Influencer, bookings are only allowed on Monday and Friday; for Press, bookings are allowed on Monday, Wednesday, and Friday; for both, bookings are only allowed on Monday and Friday.

- It will send a request to App Script to call the locking concurrency function.

- It will check if the scheduled date is not fully booked and also verify if there is a Featured Demo. If there is apply the placement logic for each newsletter type.

- The system will then save the booking, send a notification to Slack, and release the locking mechanism.
